Hero.tagline: Private Events • Corporate Catering • VIP Experiences

Services.title: Our Services
Services.description: From intimate gatherings to grand corporate galas, Mongolian National Caterer delivers excellence in every detail.

corporate.title: Corporate Catering
corporate.description: Elevating business luncheons, board meetings, and executive events with a premium culinary touch.

private.title: Private Occasions
private.description: From intimate dinner parties to grand celebrations, tailored to your unique vision and taste.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.description: Timeless flavors for your special day, from the first cocktail to the final toast.

vip.title: VIP Premiere
vip.description: Unparalleled luxury featuring bespoke menus, rare ingredients, and world-class service.

HowItWorks.title: The Journey to Excellence
HowItWorks.description: A seamless path from curated selection to unforgettable celebration.

step1.title: Service Selection
step1.description: Choose from our Luxury, Premium, or Standard tiers to perfectly match your event's needs.

step2.title: Reserve Your Date
step2.description: Select your preferred date and venue. We handle every logistical detail from there.

step3.title: Curate Your Menu
step3.description: Partner with our chefs to finalize a menu that will enchant your guests.

step4.title: Secure Your Event
step4.description: Finalize your agreement and secure your booking through our seamless digital process.

SignatureMenus.title: Signature Menus
SignatureMenus.description: A culinary odyssey curated for every occasion.

VIP.title: The VIP
VIP.description: Designed for moments that demand the extraordinary. Our VIP service offers Michelin-star caliber chefs, bespoke menu curation, and white-glove service for your most significant occasions.

Chefs.title: Masters of the Kitchen
Chefs.description: Meet the artisans behind your next unforgettable meal.
Chefs.detailDescription: {name} crafts elevated experiences with precise execution and premium ingredients.

Events.title: Unforgettable Occasions
Events.description: Recent highlights from the world of Mongolian National Caterer.

Home.ctaTitle: Elevate Your Next Occasion Above the Ordinary
Home.ctaDescription: Experience the Mongolian National Caterer distinction. Our team of world-class chefs and event specialists are ready to transform your vision into an unforgettable reality.

corporate.title: Business events with polished culinary execution.
corporate.description: From private leadership dinners to high-volume company functions, this service is built for reliability, speed, and premium guest experience.

highlights.title: Executive Ready Menus
highlights.description: Balanced pacing for breakfast briefings, lunch workshops, and evening receptions.

highlights.title: Operational Precision
highlights.description: Arrival windows, service cadence, and cleanup are aligned to your run-of-show.

highlights.title: Brand-Aligned Delivery
highlights.description: Service presentation can match company standards and event identity.

process.title: Event Brief
process.description: We align on event goals, guest profile, dietary needs, and venue constraints.

process.title: Menu and Flow Design
process.description: Our team builds a menu and service plan that fits your timeline minute-by-minute.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Dedicated coordinators manage setup, active service, and close-out without disruption.

private.title: Intimate events designed around your personal style.
private.description: Private service is built for comfort and character. Menus, pacing, and table presentation are tailored to your guests and setting so hosting feels effortless.
private.guestRangeDescription: Best suited for 10-150 guests where detail-rich hospitality and personalized pacing matter most.
touchpoints: Host-first menu workshop and atmosphere planning
Flexible service format from plated to shared style
Warm, discreet floor team for intimate guest flow
Optional beverage pairing and signature welcome setup
tone: Service stays attentive without interrupting the flow of conversation.
Course pacing adapts to your rhythm, from relaxed evenings to energetic celebrations.
Tablescape and plating details are curated to reflect your host identity.

moments.title: Dinner Parties
moments.description: Refined multi-course experiences for small guest counts and close conversation.

moments.title: Milestone Celebrations
moments.description: Birthdays and anniversaries with expressive menus shaped around your story.

moments.title: Boutique Receptions
moments.description: Creative culinary layouts for curated homes, villas, and private spaces.

wedding.title: Romantic, warm service for your most important day.
wedding.description: This page is intentionally beige and soft-toned to match wedding styling. Every service detail is planned around ceremony flow, emotional moments, and elegant guest comfort.
wedding.menuDescription: Couples typically choose a blend of plated elegance and interactive stations so formal moments feel refined while social moments remain lively and personal.
signatures: Couple-led tasting and menu refinement session
Dedicated wedding service captain and ceremony timing sync
Dietary-aware guest management for seated plans
Dessert and toast choreography with venue coordination

timeline.title: Welcome Reception
timeline.description: Passed bites and drinks during guest arrival and photo session.

timeline.title: Main Celebration Dining
timeline.description: Plated or shared-service dinner paced around speeches and rituals.

timeline.title: Late Celebration Service
timeline.description: Light comfort selections and desserts for the final part of the night.

vip.title: Bespoke service for high-stakes and high-visibility events.
vip.description: VIP is engineered for hosts who need precision, discretion, and unmistakable quality at every touchpoint from first briefing to final guest departure.
signatureMoments: Chef-led tasting arc before final event signoff
Sommelier-ready pairings for each menu movement
Real-time pacing control for high-visibility moments
cadence: Discovery and preference mapping with host or EA team.
Bespoke menu architecture and sensory presentation planning.
Real-time white-glove execution and discreet oversight.

pillars.title: Rare Ingredient Sourcing
pillars.description: Ingredient strategy is curated per guest profile and event narrative.

pillars.title: White-Glove Service
pillars.description: Senior service teams execute discreetly with VIP treatment standards.

pillars.title: Concierge Control
pillars.description: One lead point-of-contact coordinates all culinary and service decisions.
